bromazepam.dose_note: NOTE: 6mg of Bromazepam is approximately equivalent to 10mg Diazepam
bromazepam.name: bromazepam

properties.dose: Oral Light: 2.5-5mg Common: 5-10mg Heavy: 10-15mg+ | NOTE: 6mg of Bromazepam is approximately equivalent to 10mg Diazepam
properties.effects: Anxiolytic, Sedative, Muscle Relaxant, Amnesia, Dystaxia.
properties.summary: A benzodiazepine drug with a medium-long duration, developed by Roche in the 1960s. Has primarily anxiolytic properties. May cause lowered inhibitions and amnesia in high doses.

_general: Bioavailability of bromazepam in man after single administration of an oral solution. http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/6142717
